content: Supabase JWT in Tauri WebView: default storage (localStorage) doesn't persist reliably across app restarts in mobile WebView. Use PKCE auth flow for mobile/desktop (not implicit flow). OAuth redirect passes tokens in URL hash fragments which WebView doesn't forward to server - must handle in JS. For token persistence use tauri-plugin-store or equivalent native storage plugin. Supabase continuously issues new JWT per session; ensure refresh token logic runs on app resume.
